item.title: Binding Domain — gin Architecture
item.description: Handles the mapping and validation of request data into Go structs from various formats like JSON, XML, and Forms. Architectural overview of the Binding domain in the gin codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InternalUtils Domain — gin Architecture
item.description: Low-level performance optimizations and filesystem abstractions used across the framework. Architectural overview of the InternalUtils domain in the gin codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Rendering Domain — gin Architecture
item.description: Responsible for serializing and sending response data to the client in multiple formats. Architectural overview of the Rendering domain in the gin codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Routing Domain — gin Architecture
item.description: Core engine responsible for request multiplexing, middleware execution, and context management. Architectural overview of the Routing domain in the gin codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Security Domain — gin Architecture
item.description: Implements middleware for authentication and safe recovery from panics during request handling. Architectural overview of the Security domain in the gin codebase. Contains 0 source files.
